description: A customer calls to ask for the price of a round-trip flight without wanting to book it yet.

nodes.task_description: Get the desired dates and destination from the customer.
Search for available flights and find the lowest available fare.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the best price for the requested trip.

nodes.task_description: Provide the customer with a verbal quote for the total price, including all taxes and fees.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the all-inclusive price.
